name: property managers overseeing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 properties, inefficient tracking of energy usage causes compliance issues. We provide a facility management system instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate systems.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of energy usage and maintenance schedules

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient tracking of energy usage and maintenance schedules
